name: Williamsburg Chicken, as Served at London Tow4
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil a 10-inch X 13-inch pan.
2. Soften the gelatin in a little cold water or chicken broth over low heat, stirring until it dissolves.
3. Cool and stir in lemon juice, salt, pepper, and thyme into the broth.
4. Mix well with mayonnaise.
5. Add all other ingredients (except grapes) to the mixture and pour into the prepared pan.
6. Place in the refrigerator overnight or for several hours until set.
7. Decorate with halved green grapes and serve over salad greens.
